signals.headline: **~Apr 2026**: Powell warned tariffs likely cause temporary inflation rise and slower growth; stocks fell amid new Trump
signals.raw: **~Apr 2026**: Powell warned tariffs likely cause temporary inflation rise and slower growth; stocks fell amid new Trump tariffs on China EVs/syringes and Nvidia export curbs[2].

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweets Market Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweets Market Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active prediction markets as of April 21, 2026, focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (with "220-239" at 32%) and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?" (with "1120-1159" at 28% or 18% across updates).[2][3][4] These Tweet Markets show over $19.
